classes.title: Introduction to the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class introduces the Texas War of Independence, setting the stage for the conflict.
terminal: Explain the significance of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify the geographical and political context of Texas before the war
Describe the key players involved in the early stages of the conflict

classes.title: Causes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class covers the causes leading to the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: List and explain the major causes of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the impact of Mexican policies on Texan settlers
Analyze the role of cultural and political tensions in the conflict

classes.title: Major Battles of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class focuses on the key battles during the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Describe the outcomes and significance of major battles in the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify key battles such as the Battle of Gonzales and the Battle of the Alamo
Explain the strategies and tactics used by both sides

classes.title: Sam Houston and His Role in the War
classes.summary: This class examines Sam Houston's influence and leadership during the Texas War of Independence.
terminal: Evaluate Sam Houston's impact on the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Outline Sam Houston's early life and rise to leadership
Analyze his strategies and decisions during key battles

classes.title: Formation of the Republic of Texas
classes.summary: This class explores the establishment and early challenges of the Republic of Texas.
terminal: Explain the formation and early governance of the Republic of Texas
enabling: Discuss the political and economic challenges faced by the new republic
Describe the role of the Texas Declaration of Independence
